{"problem_standardized_math":"Verify that the first-order optimality conditions for problem (16.1) are equivalent, upon using the active-set definition\n\\[\n\\mathcal{A}(x^*)=\\{i\\in \\mathcal{E}\\cup \\mathcal{I}\\mid a_i^T x^* = b_i\\},\n\\]\nto the first-order optimality conditions for the equality-constrained quadratic program\n\\[\n\\min_x\\ q(x)=\\frac{1}{2}x^T Gx+x^T c\n\\qquad \\text{subject to} \\qquad\n a_i^T x=b_i, \\quad i\\in \\mathcal{A}(x^*).\n\\]"}
